q: How quickly can you respond to an emergency furnace or AC breakdown?
a: We offer same-day emergency service 7 days a week across Mississauga and the GTA. Call us and we'll do our best to have a licensed technician at your door within hours. We prioritize homes with no heat or no cooling.

q: What HVAC brands do you service?
a: We service all major brands including Lennox, Carrier, Trane, Goodman, Bryant, Rheem, Bradford White, Navien, Mitsubishi, Bosch, and more. Our technicians are trained and certified on each brand's equipment.

q: Are there government rebates for a new furnace or heat pump in Ontario?
a: Yes — the Canada Greener Homes Grant offers up to $5,000, and the Enbridge Home Efficiency Rebate Plus (HER+) adds up to $5,600 for eligible homeowners. Heat pump rebates can reach $10,600 combined. We help you qualify and apply.

q: Do you offer financing on new HVAC installations?
a: Yes. We partner with leading financing providers to offer flexible monthly payment plans with approved credit. Ask us about 0% financing options when you request your quote.

q: How often should I service my furnace and air conditioner?
a: Both should be serviced annually — your furnace in the fall before heating season, and your air conditioner in the spring before cooling season. Regular maintenance extends equipment life, improves efficiency, and keeps manufacturer warranties valid.
